backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Report describing a feature update to the About section adding a new subsection and three division cards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of existing frontend file summaries covering all major components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining light/dark theme variables and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with metadata and script loader for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component composing all site sections into a single page layout.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Client-side contact form with validation, success state, and automatic reset.
frontend/src/components/sections/About.t: About section with three feature cards and a second subsection listing three business divisions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing office details and rendering the contact form.
Renders the site footer with company info, social links, and smooth-scrolling navigation links.
frontend/src/components/sections/Hero.ts: Displays the hero section with headline, description, CTA buttons, and a featured image.
Implements a responsive navigation bar with smooth-scroll links and a mobile sheet menu.
Provides an interface to upload, validate, display, and manage persisted photos with error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Shows a grid of service categories with icons and lists of sub-services.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Renders client testimonials in a responsive card grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on user identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login state and loading stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/usePersistedPhotos.ts: Implements a hook for storing, retrieving, and managing photos in localStorage with size checks and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, custom theme variables, dark mode settings, and accessibility-focused global CSS rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, animations, container settings, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature requirements, and state for updating the About section with new boxed items.
